title: crataegus brevispina var. contracta
intro: Crataegus brevispina var. contracta is a specific variety of the hawthorn tree, known for its compact growth habit and small, thorny branches. The medicinal properties of C. brevispina var. contracta lie in its rich concentration of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart health and stress relief. C. brevispina var. contracta is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
